description.value: In pleasing the cravings of a mighty dragon, they have deigned to impart some of their magical essence into your body. Your eyes begin to glow and change color while your limbs and neck grow a veneer of scales, visually matching the associated dragon, accompanied by a near-insatiable desire to amass a hoard of your own. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dragon Breath] sorcerer bloodline spell, emulating the breath of the associated dragon. If you don't have one, you gain a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You Refocus by counting and arranging your treasure.

value.value: You have succeeded at an important task given by a dragon such as procuring a special treasure for their hoard
